v.1
Lesson 6 Summary Guide
 Two types of lists: email lists and non-email lists
 Email lists:
o Prospects
o Customers
o Buyers
o Affiliates
o JVs
o Network (Discussion or mastermind list)
 Non-email lists:
o Facebook friends and likes
o Twitter followers
o YouTube subscribers
o Blog RSS subscribers
o Linkedin connections
 Client/buyer list is worth 15X more than prospect list
 Buyer lists are money in the bank “on steroids”
 Remember, you are in the business of “building your list”
 It’s a common misconception that you always need a list to do a
product launch. In reality, you do a product launch to build a list!
 Always be mindful of the “Avatar” for your different lists…writing
to a single person
